column1: # PC Monitor - Custom Partition Table (ESP32-S3 N16R8 - 16MB Flash)
# OTA layout (v2.4): two app slots so firmware can be updated over USB serial
# by the companion app (FW_BEGIN/FW_DATA/FW_END protocol) - no cable reflash.
# NOTE: Changing to this table requires ONE final manual flash via idf.py.
#       once; it auto-formats on first boot and can be re-provisioned via app.
